summary: Completed testing of DREAMOVEN Kitchen Requisition Stock Warning Feature. All features working correctly: (1) /api/stock/current endpoint returns proper stock data with 602 items (321 with 0 stock, 281 with stock > 0), (2) Item dropdown shows green text with available quantity for in-stock items, (3) Out-of-stock items show red 'OUT OF STOCK' badge with strikethrough text and red X icon, (4) Alert prevents selection of out-of-stock items, (5) Quantity validation alerts when exceeding available stock and auto-adjusts to maximum.
passed_tests: API /api/stock/current returns 602 items with stock data
Stock data includes required fields: item_id, item_name, current_stock, category, unit
321 items have 0 stock (for testing out-of-stock feature)
281 items have stock > 0 (for testing in-stock feature)
Kitchen user login works (srpb@dreamoven.com / kitchen@123)
Invalid password correctly rejected with 401
Items endpoint returns data for requisition form
Requisition creation with in-stock item succeeds
Kitchen can view requisitions list
Stock data item references are valid
All stock quantities are non-negative
API health check passes
UI: Kitchen user can login and navigate to Requisitions page
UI: New Request dialog opens with 'Items Needed (Stock shown in green)' label
UI: Item dropdown shows green text with 'X avail.' for in-stock items (e.g., '10 Inch Cake Box - 800 avail.')
UI: Out-of-stock items show red 'OUT OF STOCK' badge (e.g., 'Chocolate Chips Dark')
UI: Out-of-stock items have strikethrough text and red X icon
UI: Alert prevents selection of out-of-stock items with message: 'OUT OF STOCK - Please select a different item'
UI: After selecting in-stock item, shows 'X available in store' in green
UI: Quantity field shows '(max: X)' based on available stock
UI: Quantity validation alerts when exceeding available stock
UI: Quantity auto-adjusts to maximum available when exceeding stock
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data (602 items in stock endpoint, 321 with 0 stock)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kitchen Requisition Stock Warning Feature fully tested and working. The feature uses /api/stock/current endpoint to fetch stock data when the New Requisition dialog opens. Items with 0 stock show red 'OUT OF STOCK' badge and cannot be selected. Items with stock > 0 show green text with available quantity. Quantity validation prevents ordering more than available stock.

out_of_stock_display.red_badge: OUT OF STOCK shown in red

in_stock_display.available_in_store: X available in store shown after selection

out_of_stock_prevention.alert_message: OUT OF STOCK - Please select a different item
